documents.title: Vermont Contaminated Sites Management Rule
documents.description: Primary Vermont regulation governing the investigation and cleanup of contaminated sites. Establishes risk-based cleanup standards, investigation requirements, and closure procedures.

documents.title: VT Construction Stormwater General Permit
documents.description: Vermont Agency of Natural Resources general permit for construction sites disturbing 1+ acres. Requires preparation and implementation of an Erosion Prevention and Sediment Control (EPSC) plan.

documents.title: Vermont Stormwater Management Manual
documents.description: VT DEC guidance for post-construction stormwater management. Covers runoff volume reduction, water quality treatment, and LID design for new development and redevelopment.

documents.title: Vermont Brownfields Program — Site Assessment
documents.description: Vermont Agency of Commerce and Community Development Brownfields Program resources, including Phase I and II ESA guidance, AAI compliance, and EPA Brownfields grant information.
